title: The Depths of Impel Down: Turning Point
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Blackbeard, Unknown person #4, Luffy, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Blackbeard, Unknown person #4, Luffy, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #17, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nothing is impossible in this world.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: The Sky Island was real, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The age of pirate dreams is over....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Look forward to it, you guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: In just a few short hours,

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: That okamakov nmm~ CD got me!!
